top_stories.title: Good until April 2027: PH secures rice supply from Vietnam
top_stories.summary: MANILA, Philippines – The Philippines and Vietnam have forged a one-year rice supply agreement to ensure the availability of the household staple until April 2027 amid risks from the Middle East crisis and a possible El Niño dry spell later this year.
